---
author: ""
header-includes:
   - \usepackage{rotating}
   - \usepackage{float}
   - \usepackage{natbib}
   - \usepackage{booktabs}
   - \usepackage{multirow}
geometry: "left=1cm,right=1cm,top=0.9cm,bottom=1.2cm"
output: 
  pdf_document:
    citation_package: natbib
    keep_tex: false
    number_sections: true
link-citations: yes
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r, echo = FALSE, results = 'asis', warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
rm(list = ls())
library(data.table)
library(dplyr)
library(scales)
library(xtable)
library(this.path)
setwd(this.path::this.dir())

# FIT and OFI
data <- readRDS("../g_referee_responses/r5_major2/tmp/raw_files/ofi_dispersion_by_year_and_bin.RDS")[disp_type == "ofi_sd", .(yyyy, bin, disp_mean = disp_mean * 100, disp_median = disp_q50 * 100)]
data <- dcast(data, yyyy ~ bin, value.var = c("disp_mean", "disp_median"))
data[, disp_mean_4 := disp_mean_3 - disp_mean_1]
data[, disp_median_4 := disp_median_3 - disp_median_1]

# format
data <- melt(data, id.vars = "yyyy", variable.name = "var", value.name = "disp") %>%
  mutate(var = as.character(var)) %>%
  mutate(disp = sprintf("%.2f", disp)) %>%
  setDT()
data <- dcast(data, yyyy ~ var, value.var = "disp")
data[, yyyy := sprintf("%.0f", yyyy)]

# add col columns
col_names <- data.table(t(as.data.frame(c("", paste0("(", 1:(ncol(data) - 1), ")")))))
names(col_names) <- names(data)
data <- bind_rows(col_names, data)
rm(col_names)

# add variable names
names(data) <- c("", rep(c("Bin 1", "Bin 2", "Bin 3", "Bin 3-1"), 2))

align_vector <- paste0("ll", paste0(rep("c", times = ncol(data) - 1), collapse = ""))
x.side <- xtable(data, align = align_vector)

this_add_to_row <- list(
  pos = list(-1, 0, nrow(data)),
  command = c(
    "\\toprule & \\multicolumn{4}{c}{Mean dispersion (\\%)} & \\multicolumn{4}{c}{Median dispersion (\\%)} \\\\\n \\cmidrule(l){2-5} \\cmidrule(l){6-9}\n",
    "\\cmidrule(l){2-4} \\cmidrule(l){5-5} \\cmidrule(l){6-8} \\cmidrule(l){9-9}\n \\vspace{5pt}",
    "\\bottomrule \n"
  )
)

print(x.side,
  type = "latex",
  table.placement = "!ht",
  include.rownames = FALSE,
  include.colnames = TRUE,
  tabular.environment = "tabular",
  caption.placement = NULL, # "top", NULL
  hline.after = NULL, # We don't need hline; we use booktabs
  floating = FALSE, # whether \begin{Table} should be created (TRUE) or not (FALSE)
  sanitize.text.function = force, # Important to treat content of first column as latex function
  add.to.row = this_add_to_row
)

to_dir <- "../output/tables/"
dir.create(to_dir, recursive = T, showWarnings = F)
print(x.side,
  type = "latex",
  table.placement = "!ht",
  include.rownames = FALSE,
  include.colnames = TRUE,
  tabular.environment = "tabular",
  caption.placement = NULL, # "top", NULL
  hline.after = NULL, # We don't need hline; we use booktabs
  floating = FALSE, # whether \begin{Table} should be created (TRUE) or not (FALSE)
  sanitize.text.function = force, # Important to treat content of first column as latex function
  add.to.row = this_add_to_row,
  file = paste0(to_dir, "summary_statistics_dispersion.tex")
)
```
